name: Issue quotes with HTTP / REST API and MySQL hands-free

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf03500-document`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Gather API Numbers

### Gather API Numbers

GET https://api.example.com/v1/documents — retries 3× with backoff on failure.

Next: Blend Sources

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 API key / bearer for the target API

### Gather from MySQL

mySql — `select` operation against the connected account.

Next: Blend Sources

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 MySQL connection

### Blend Sources

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Roll Up KPIs

### Roll Up KPIs

Group-by + aggregate (like a pivot table) — turns raw rows into KPI numbers.

Next: Compose HTML Report

### Compose HTML Report

Custom JavaScript: Build an HTML digest table from the aggregated rows

Next: Send Report via Outlook

### Send Report via Outlook

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Stamp Processing Time

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Stamp Processing Time

Stamps `processedAt` with the current time for auditing.

# Issue quotes with HTTP / REST API and MySQL hands-free

**Pattern:** Document Generation · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Issue quotes with HTTP / REST API and MySQL hands-free. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual contracts is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Gather API Numbers → Blend Sources → Roll Up KPIs → Compose HTML Report → Send Report via Outlook → Stamp Processing Time

## Use it for
- Teams that want to document generation without manual effort
- Anyone automating contracts in legal
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Saves hours of manual work each week
- Keeps your systems in sync

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; Microsoft OAuth2; MySQL connection.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your contracts process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
